data.title: Planet Lunch News
LBank has launched the Launchpool project StakeStone, which allows users to earn 166,666 STO tokens without staking or locking up.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to LBank official news, LBank has launched the fifth Launchpool project StakeStone, with a total prize pool of 166,666 STOs. Users do not need to pledge and lock related tokens. They can get airdrops by holding more than 1,000 USDT or more than 98,000 LBK.
The registration time is from 11:00 on April 3 to 18:00 on April 4 (SGT), and the snapshot time is from 18:00 on April 1 to 18:00 on April 4 (SGT). The STO token airdrop will be completed at 22:00 on April 4.
StakeStone is a decentralized liquidity infrastructure protocol dedicated to optimizing the revenue generation and liquidity distribution of blockchain networks. The protocol creates efficient income opportunities for liquidity providers through innovative liquidity solutions (such as LiquidityPad) and interest-bearing ETH/BTC assets, while accurately connecting the specialized liquidity needs of various ecosystems and protocols.

data.title: Mantle announces the launch of Mantle Banking, a crypto banking app, and MI4, an index fund
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Mantle announced two major releases in its latest quarterly letter: Mantle Banking, a crypto banking application, and Mantle Index Four (MI4), a tokenized fund.
Mantle Banking will integrate fiat and cryptocurrency asset management functions, allowing users to consume, save and invest in one account, and support direct tokenization of wages into stablecoins, combined with virtual card global payments, to create a seamless bridge between TradFi and DeFi.
MI4 is a tokenized fund supported by Mantle Treasury's $400 million investment, positioned as a "crypto version of the S&P 500", providing efficient crypto Beta exposure, and will be traded in tokenized form on the Mantle Network in the future.
Mantle said these products will drive the further development of its ecosystem and invited $MNT holders to participate in feature design and product governance.

data.title: Cardano (ADA) Downtrend Deepens—Is a Rebound Possible?
data.description:
Cardano price started a recovery wave above the $0. 680 zone but failed. ADA is consolidating near $0. 650 and remains at risk of more losses
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/ada/cardano-ada-downtrend-deepens-0-65/

data.title: Binance Wallet will soon launch StakeStone (STO) exclusive TGE
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Wallet will launch StakeStone TGE. The investment time is 16:00-16:30 on April 3rd, Beijing time.

data.title: Bitget Seed launches project penguin tariff (PT)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Seed has launched Solana's MEME token penguin tariff (PT).
Bitget Seed is a brand new on-chain asset trading platform that focuses on exploring high-potential projects in the market. Bitget Seed will select 0-5 high-quality tokens every day.

data.title: Bedrock: WBTC-uniBTC liquidity pool TVL increased more than 7 times in 24 hours, with an annualized rate of return up to 66%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official data, the TVL of the WBTC-uniBTC liquidity pool on KodiakFi surged from $800,000 to $6.49 million in the past 24 hours, an increase of 711%.
Users can go to the Bedrock platform to participate in the WBTC | uniBTC reward vault staking, with an annualized yield of up to 66%.
